basics.name: Atheesh Alva
basics.label: Flutter Engineer  · Technical Consultant
basics.summary: Strategic Flutter Engineer architecting high-availability mobile ecosystems and scalable cloud-native solutions. Expert in bridging the gap between complex UI/UX requirements and high-performance backend systems. A technical leader focused on engineering excellence through CI/CD automation, architectural reasoning, and cross-functional team mentorship.

automationTasks.label: Play Store & App Store Release Pipeline
OWASP Check and PR Creation Pipeline

work.name: Ostrum tech Limited, UK
highlights: Architectural Optimization: Refactored and optimized complex legacy codebases, achieving a 60% reduction in source volume while significantly enhancing system scalability and runtime performance.
CI/CD Architecture: Engineered automated CI/CD pipelines that reduced manual deployment time from 4 hours to 30 minutes per release cycle.

State & Data Management: Implemented BLoC state management pattern across all applications, achieving clean separation of UI and business logic layers. Implemented HydratedBloc and Drift, reducing redundant network requests by 30% through intelligent local caching and persistence.
Strategic Resource Management: Decreased monthly cloud infrastructure overhead by 25% through rigorous code optimization and the elimination of redundant API calls.
Technical Mentorship: Led a team of 5+ developers, conducting bi-weekly technical workshops that reduced average PR revision cycles.

work.name: Infosys Limited, India
highlights: SAP HANA Implementation: Spearheaded the implementation of SAP HANA for a major retail client.
SAP BW Optimization: Led the optimization of SAP BW data models, reducing query execution time and improving overall system performance.
SAP BI Reporting: Developed and maintained SAP BI reports and dashboards, enhancing data visualisation and decision-making for business stakeholders.
Migration from On-Prem to AWS Cloud: Played a key role in the migration of SAP systems from on-premises to cloud infrastructure, ensuring minimal downtime and data integrity.

education.institution: Nitte Meenakshi Institute of Technology, Bangalore, IN

items.name: Play Store & App Store Deployment and maintenance

projects.name: Purple Door
projects.description: Live Mobile application on Play Store and App Store for airport assistance services, providing real-time support for passengers with special needs. Features include booking assistance, live tracking, and push notifications. Integrated AWS services for backend processing and MySQL for data management.

projects.name: Ostrum
projects.description: Live Mobile application on Play Store and App Store; is a special assistance platform enabled at airports. It is intended to be used by special assistance agents, pilots, cabin crew and boarding agents. Access to this app is limited and is controlled by the relevant airports or special assistance providers.

projects.name: Flarcade
projects.description: App that provides a collection of mini-games built using Flutter, showcasing the framework's capabilities in creating engaging and interactive gaming experiences. The app features a variety of games, including puzzles, arcade-style challenges, and casual games, all designed to demonstrate the versatility and performance of Flutter in game development.
